title: 2 Pack Silicone Trivets for Hot Pans and Pots, 40x30cm Large Multipurpose Silicone Trivets for Kitchen Worktops, Flexible Heat Resistant Mat Kitchen Worktop Protector for Hot Dishes Pots No Slip
features: 【High Quality Silicone Mats】These trivets are made of food grade silicone material, BPA-Free and heat-resistant. The flexible and durable hot pad helps protect your countertops from hot pots, pans, drips, and spills.

【Anti-Slip and Anti-Overflow Design】The non-slip silicone material and the concave-convex design make the pot on the hot pad not slide easily. It is easy to grab a hot dish with the silicon mat.The raised edge can prevent the overflow of water or soup and keep the table clean.

【Multi-Functional】The trivet is widely used in kitchen. Silicone trivet extreme temperatures range from -40°F to 450°F. Such as used for kitchen counter spoon rest, potholders, jar openers, pot mats, drying mats, hot dishes, It's a very useful kitchen helper tool.

【Easy to Clean and Store】The pot holder is hand and dishwasher washable. Almost everything can easily wash off the non-stick surface and quickly dry. You can stack, roll up or hang on to store,easy and save space.

【Perfect Kitchen Worktop Protector】A great idea gift for your family, friends, colleagues, etc. You'll find they're incredibly convenient to handle. If there are any issues, just contact us and we will make it right within 24 hours.
